title: Skillet American Hash
description: A smoky and flavorful dish made with skillet-roasted vegetables, perfect for any meal.
instructions: Preheat a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the skillet oil and sauté the bell peppers until tender.
Add the charred sweet potatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C).
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top with shredded cheese.
Return the skillet to the stovetop over medium heat and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
